title: rubus pedunculosus
intro: Rubus pedunculosus, also known as the Himalayan Raspberry or Indian Raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family that is native to the Himalayas and the Indian subcontinent. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high antioxidant and anti-inflammatory content, which has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions such as digestive issues and fever. The health benefits of Rubus pedunculosus include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and improve cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or powder, and is often used in traditional medicine to support overall well-being and prevent various diseases.
